mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_ergonomics_assessment WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY assess_date DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ergonomics_assessment WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_ergonomics_assessment WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_ergonomics_assessment WHERE risk_level = #{riskLevel} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY assess_date DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ergonomics_assessment WHERE risk_level = #{riskLevel} AND deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM tb_ergonomics_assessment WHERE (work_process LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR worker_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%') AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY assess_date DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ergonomics_assessment WHERE (work_process LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR worker_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%') AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ergonomics_assessment WHERE assessment_id LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ergonomics_assessment ( assessment_id, assess_type, department, work_process, work_description, worker_name, worker_id, assess_date, assessor_name, score, risk_level, affected_body_parts, symptoms, improvement_action, improvement_deadline, improvement_status, photo_file_id, notes, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{assessmentId}, #{assessType}, #{department}, #{workProcess}, #{workDescription}, #{workerName}, #{workerId}, #{assessDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{assessorName}, #{score}, #{riskLevel}, #{affectedBodyParts}, #{symptoms}, #{improvementAction}, #{improvementDeadline,jdbcType=DATE}, #{improvementStatus}, #{photoFileId}, #{notes}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ergonomics_assessment SET assess_type = #{assessType}, department = #{department}, work_process = #{workProcess}, work_description = #{workDescription}, worker_name = #{workerName}, worker_id = #{workerId}, assess_date = #{assessDate,jdbcType=DATE}, assessor_name = #{assessorName}, score = #{score}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, affected_body_parts = #{affectedBodyParts}, symptoms = #{symptoms}, improvement_action = #{improvementAction}, improvement_deadline = #{improvementDeadline,jdbcType=DATE}, improvement_status = #{improvementStatus}, photo_file_id = #{photoFileId}, notes = #{notes}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_ergonomics_assessment SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
